NOTES:

∆ Yamato is NOT trans (Oda, the author, already confirmed this.) Yamato admires Oden and that is why she refers to herself as Oden, as she is not referring to being Oden, but sees Oden as an important figure and a way of life. Taking this into account, do not confuse the gender if the character is not trans. She has an obsession with Oden and does not consider herself a boy.

The representation of this character goes beyond gender dysphoria; without underestimating it, the real representation is as complex as mentioned above.

∆ Please, respect my opinion and my decision to create this bot to my liking, as much as I will respect yours.
